name: Rachel
history: Rachel has recurring relationship problems with her husband Ivan. Work-related stress. Sister Emma often takes a caring role toward Rachel. Father had a successful career and strong work ethic, influencing Rachel's expectations. Recently laid off and currently looking for new employment.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I need to be understood and validated by others.
intermediate_belief_depression: If others don't validate my experiences, it means I'm overreacting or being dramatic.
coping_strategies: Rachel often puts on a 'happy clown dance' to mask her true feelings and avoid being perceived as dramatic.
situation: Comparing personal career aspirations to those of the spouse.
auto_thought: People don't understand what I'm going through, and they think I'm making a bigger deal out of things.
behavior: Rachel tends to withdraw from conversations when she feels misunderstood or invalidated.
